ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train */,
  "train_name" TEXT /* Name of the train */,
  "train_type" TEXT /* Type of train (e.g., express, passenger, freight) */,
  "classes" TEXT /* Classes of service available (e.g., 2A, 3A, SL, 2S) */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the train */,
  "operating_zone" TEXT /* Zone where the train operates */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the train */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "days_of_run" TEXT /* Days of the week the train runs */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the train */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the train */,
  "origin_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin station */,
  "destination_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination station */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the train schedule */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the train (e.g., on time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_schedules_destination_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_schedules_origin_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger (for international travel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of service booked */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the reservation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the reservation */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., 2A, 3A, SL, 2S) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "seat_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the class (e.g., air conditioning, snacks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the crew member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., driver, conductor) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the crew member */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date of joining of the crew member */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "duty_date" TEXT /* Date of duty */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the crew schedule (e.g., on duty, off duty) */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_schedules_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Fare amount for the class */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the fare is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the fare is valid */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, debit card, online transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Code for the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station (city, state) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the station */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_stations" (
  "train_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train-station */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time at the station */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time from the station */,
  "platform_number" TEXT /* Platform number of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the train at the station (e.g., arrived, departed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_stations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_stations_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "delay_date" TEXT /* Date of the delay */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the delay (e.g., resolved, ongoing) */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time after the delay */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time after the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delays_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)
column_names: Type of train (e.g., express, passenger, freight)
Days of the week the train runs
Status of the train (e.g., on time, delayed, cancelled)
Date of birth of the passenger

Amenities available in the class (e.g., air conditioning, snacks)
Unique identifier for each crew member
Email address of the crew member
Phone number of the crew member
Role of the crew member (e.g., driver, conductor)

Date of joining of the crew member
Status of the crew schedule (e.g., on duty, off duty)
Date from which the fare is valid
Date until which the fare is valid
Method of payment (e.g., credit card, debit card, online transfer)
Status of the train at the station (e.g., arrived, departed)
Status of the delay (e.g., resolved, ongoing)
